reasoning: Multiple credible search results confirm that Kilmar Abrego Garcia, who was mistakenly deported to El Salvador, was returned to the United States in early June 2025. Specifically, reports from NPR, Al Jazeera, Politico, and CNN published on or around June 6, 2025, state that he was returned to the U.S. (arriving in Nashville, Tennessee) to face criminal smuggling charges. A federal grand jury indicted him on May 21, and Attorney General Pam Bondi announced his return on June 6, 2025. His entry onto U.S. territory occurred well before the July 1, 2025 deadline. The resolution criteria are strictly satisfied.
